_doc: FLUX.1-dev txt2img workflow (ComfyUI API format) for cb-imagegen. content-studio sends this as {"input":{"workflow": <this>}} with {prompt}/{width}/{height}/{seed} substituted. The face-lock variant (flux_pulid.json) adds a PuLID Apply node fed by the client's face image. NOTE: model filenames below must match the files in the base image's /comfyui/models — verify on first deploy and adjust if ComfyUI reports 'model not found'.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, watermark, text, deformed
